name: Log Snapshot Test
author: PermsTest
description: Bundled native plugin that summarizes PermsTest log and log-archive folders.
comments: Small test plugin for validating plugin restore, shell capture, highlighted viewer output, and optional Run In Window behavior.

entry.notes: Actions map to handlers registered by dev.perms.test.plugins.PluginActionRegistry.

actions.title: Show Log Snapshot
actions.description: List current PermsTest log folders, sizes, and recent files for testing/plugin diagnostics.
